title: astragalina australis
intro: Astragalina australis, also known as Astragalus australis, is a perennial plant belonging to the legume family, native to Australia and Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immune-modulating effects. The health benefits associated with Astragalina australis include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and fatigue, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Astragalina australis can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
